# ASKSYDNEY.AI

> Sydney AI concierge — a premium .ai domain presented by Noustelos Studio as part of the "Ask" concierge network. The domain asksydney.ai is available for acquisition.

This is a single-page, design-only site. The on-page chat is a scripted demo, not a live AI — the network's live concierge runs at asksantorini.ai. There is no backend, no data collection, and no user accounts.

## Acquisition

- The domain asksydney.ai is for sale. Enquiries: info@asksantorini.ai

## Sister concierges

- [asksantorini.ai](https://asksantorini.ai): live AI concierge for Santorini, Greece
- [asksingapore.ai](https://asksingapore.ai): AI concierge for Singapore
- [askaustralia.ai](https://askaustralia.ai): AI concierge for Australia
- [asknewyork.ai](https://asknewyork.ai): AI concierge for New York
- [askmykonos.ai](https://askmykonos.ai): AI concierge for Mykonos, Greece

## Studio

- [noustelos.gr](https://noustelos.gr): Noustelos Studio — the studio behind the "Ask" network
